story_arc.title: Raw Song
story_arc.theme_ko: K-Pop Dance, Future House, Brazilian Funk, 128 BPM, sad mood에 맞춘 곡별 애니메이션 뮤직비디오
story_arc.logline_ko: 'Raw Song'는 dreamlike anime wanderer surrounded by floating audio-light fragments가 tears turning into tiny cyber-pink light particles를 따라가며 quiet city street after rain, mirror-wet glass corridor, holographic bus stop at night를 통과하는 dreamy synth anime noir MV입니다.
story_arc.story_summary_ko: 이 뮤직비디오는 고정된 색상톤은 유지하되, 장면과 캐릭터는 'K-Pop Dance, Future House, Brazilian Funk'의 리듬, 128 BPM의 속도감, 섹션별 가사와 감정 변화에 맞춰 전개됩니다. 반복 상징은 tears turning into tiny cyber-pink light particles이며, 각 장면은 같은 주인공을 유지하면서도 장소, 행동, 카메라, 영상 움직임을 다르게 설계합니다.

acts.name: opening
acts.purpose_ko: 곡의 사운드 질감, 주인공, 핵심 상징을 소개합니다.

acts.name: development
acts.purpose_ko: 벌스와 프리코러스의 가사 정서를 행동과 공간 변화로 보여줍니다.

acts.name: climax
acts.purpose_ko: 코러스와 브리지에서 BPM과 에너지에 맞춰 카메라와 빛의 강도를 높입니다.

acts.name: resolution
acts.purpose_ko: 마지막 가사와 잔향에 맞춰 상징을 정리하고 다음 감정으로 닫습니다.

continuity_rules: 한 곡 안에서는 같은 주인공, 같은 의상, 같은 대표 소품을 유지합니다.
곡이 바뀌면 장르, BPM, 가사, 분위기에 맞춰 새 주인공과 새 소품을 생성합니다.

색상톤은 유지합니다: limited-color cyber anime palette: neon magenta/cyber pink dominant, deep plum/dark violet shadows, graphite gray/near-black backgrounds, subtle icy cyan reflections only, and silver-white highlights.
각 섹션은 가사, 섹션 설명, 강도, BPM에 따라 다른 장소, 행동, 카메라 움직임을 가져야 합니다.

visual_world.visual_identity: dreamy synth anime noir within dark cyber noir anime with neon magenta and cyber pink dominance
visual_world.song_motif: tears turning into tiny cyber-pink light particles

color_palette.rule: limited-color cyber anime palette: neon magenta/cyber pink dominant, deep plum/dark violet shadows, graphite gray/near-black backgrounds, subtle icy cyan reflections only, and silver-white highlights

recurring_symbols: tears turning into tiny cyber-pink light particles
visual_world.lighting_language: strobing but controlled cyber-pink accents on beat peaks, airy pads, soft bloom, slow neon trails, glassy reflections, deep plum shadows, graphite darkness, silver-white rim highlights
visual_world.transition_language: beat-matched impact cuts and fast reflection wipes through tears turning into tiny cyber-pink light particles, neon reflections, and airy pads, soft bloom, slow neon trails, glassy reflections

protagonist.identity: dreamlike anime wanderer surrounded by floating audio-light fragments
protagonist.hair: soft layered dark hair with translucent cyber-pink edge highlights
protagonist.outfit: long lightweight coat over minimal futuristic casualwear, reflective trim
protagonist.silhouette: floating coat line and quiet futuristic profile
protagonist.accent_detail: neon magenta and cyber pink remains dominant, but the prop and gestures follow this song motif: tears turning into tiny cyber-pink light particles
consistency_rules: Keep the same face, hairstyle, outfit, body proportions, and signature prop within this song only.
Do not reuse this character design for a different song unless the user explicitly requests a series identity.
Let pose, expression, setting, and action change per section according to lyrics, genre, intensity, and BPM.
Use anime cinematic styling, never live-action realism.
First generate Step 00 (character turnaround model sheet) before creating any scene image.
Attach that same character model sheet when generating every scene image for this song.
Attach the final scene image as the primary image-to-video reference when generating the video for that scene.
reference_workflow: Generate a clean song-specific character turnaround model sheet before scene production.
Use the same model sheet as an input/reference for every scene image prompt in this song.
After each scene image is approved, use that scene image as the primary image-to-video input with the matching video prompt.
When possible, include the model sheet as a secondary reference during video generation to protect character identity.
required_reference_views: prop close-up of small prism-like synth shard

character_model_sheet.purpose: Generate this song-specific character turnaround model sheet before any scene image.
character_model_sheet.character_reference_prompt:
# Character Turnaround Model Sheet Prompt

Create the master character turnaround model sheet for this song. This model sheet will be attached as the identity reference for every later scene image, and optionally as a secondary reference for video generation.

Required views:
- front full-body view
- left side full-body view
- right side full-body view
- back full-body view
- three-quarter full-body view
- face close-up
- prop close-up of small prism-like synth shard

Character design: dreamlike anime wanderer surrounded by floating audio-light fragments, anime character, stylized and non-photorealistic, soft layered dark hair with translucent cyber-pink edge highlights, long lightweight coat over minimal futuristic casualwear, reflective trim, floating coat line and quiet futuristic profile. Signature prop: small prism-like synth shard. Accent detail: neon magenta and cyber pink remains dominant, but the prop and gestures follow this song motif: tears turning into tiny cyber-pink light particles. Visual world: dreamy synth anime noir within dark cyber noir anime with neon magenta and cyber pink dominance.

Composition: clean anime production model sheet, neutral simple background, aligned character views at the same scale, full body visible from head to toe in each turnaround pose, clear face close-up, clear hairstyle silhouette, clear outfit seams, clear signature prop, no dramatic camera angle, no cropped limbs, no environmental scene, no action pose. limited-color cyber anime palette: neon magenta/cyber pink dominant, deep plum/dark violet shadows, graphite gray/near-black backgrounds, subtle icy cyan reflections only, and silver-white highlights. Non-photorealistic, no live action, no text, no watermark.

Consistency rules:
- Keep the same face, hairstyle, outfit, body proportions, and signature prop within this song only.
- Do not reuse this character design for a different song unless the user explicitly requests a series identity.
- Let pose, expression, setting, and action change per section according to lyrics, genre, intensity, and BPM.
- Use anime cinematic styling, never live-action realism.
- First generate Step 00 (character turnaround model sheet) before creating any scene image.
- Attach that same character model sheet when generating every scene image for this song.
- Attach the final scene image as the primary image-to-video reference when generating the video for that scene.

Production workflow:
- Generate a clean song-specific character turnaround model sheet before scene production.
- Use the same model sheet as an input/reference for every scene image prompt in this song.
- After each scene image is approved, use that scene image as the primary image-to-video input with the matching video prompt.
- When possible, include the model sheet as a secondary reference during video generation to protect character identity.
required_views: prop close-up of small prism-like synth shard
usage: Attach this model sheet as the identity reference for every scene image prompt in this song.
Use each generated scene image as the primary image-to-video reference.
If the video tool supports multiple references, attach this model sheet as a secondary video reference.
